descEs: Antes de empezar, estos son los conceptos que vas a ver repetidos en todo el playbook. No los memorices ahora — vuelve aqui cuando los encuentres y no sepas que significan. Cada tarjeta te dice que es, por que importa, y que pasa si lo ignoras. Click en cualquiera para ver el detalle completo.
descEn: Before starting, these are the concepts you'll see repeated throughout the playbook. Don't memorize them now — come back when you encounter them and don't know what they mean. Each card tells you what it is, why it matters, and what happens if you ignore it. Click any for full detail.

terms.shortEs: Disenado con IA desde el origen
terms.shortEn: Designed with AI from the start

terms.shortEs: Value, Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies — justifica cada semaforo con evidencia
terms.shortEn: Value, Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies — justify every traffic light with evidence

terms.shortEs: 4 componentes: Decisiones, Tareas, Ruta critica, Indexacion
terms.shortEn: 4 components: Decisions, Tasks, Critical path, Indexing

terms.shortEs: Estado del proyecto por valor entregado, no por actividad
terms.shortEn: Project status by delivered value, not activity

terms.shortEs: Investigacion avanzada con docenas de fuentes verificables
terms.shortEn: Advanced research with dozens of verifiable sources

terms.shortEs: Responde solo basandose en TUS documentos — cero alucinacion
terms.shortEn: Answers only based on YOUR documents — zero hallucination

terms.shortEs: Sigue, rompe, trasciende — modelo de maestria japones
terms.shortEn: Follow, break, transcend — Japanese mastery model

terms.shortEs: Cada output necesita dueno + fecha + criterio de exito
terms.shortEn: Every output needs owner + date + success criteria

terms.shortEs: Estructura repetible, destino definido, verificacion y accountability
terms.shortEn: Repeatable structure, defined destination, verification and accountability

_composerNotes: The 10 terms above are generic and apply to ANY AI-native workflow playbook. The compose-manifest script should merge these with any playbook-specific terms. The _generate marker indicates which fields need LLM generation per playbook context.
